title: [v3.2.3-rhel] Disable static v3.2.3 rhel
body:
This test frequently fails and is of little use on a release-branch and
for any backports that may occur in the future.  Simply remove it.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ugh, I'm [guessing we need the golangci-lint installer URL patch](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5418914900344832) here as well...
